title: NoSQL for modern apps and AI: The future of Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable
summary: Google Cloud's NoSQL database services (Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable) are advancing to support modern AI and agentic applications. The session covers architectural innovations and scalable solutions designed for high-performance AI workloads.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session details how three NoSQL services (Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable) are evolving to support modern AI and agentic applications. It matters because these databases are being repositioned for high-performance AI workloads rather than general storage alone. The concrete topics include vector search and vector database capabilities, prompt caching, time-series forecasting, and support for AI agents, alongside the underlying architectural innovations and scalable solutions enabling them.
